further_reading.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
further_reading.why_relevant: Foundational paper for in-context learning, which underlies why prompts and examples shape model behavior.

further_reading.title: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions with Human Feedback
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful background on instruction-following behavior and why models can respond differently based on how tasks are framed.

notes: Purely pedagogical intro module with no hard factual claims that require inline citations under the target density rules; examples are instructional rather than factual assertions.
